case_title: CATHY RILEY VS. CARWARRANTYNOW.COM et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY RILEY, CATHY AS TO DEFENDANT CARWARRANTYNOW.COM WARREN, BILL AKMG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WARREN, BILL

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CARWARRANTYNOW.COM
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JPT JEAN MILEFF FILED BY RILEY, CATHY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2011 BY JPT JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. JPT JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RILEY, CATHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARWARRANTYNOW.COM WARREN, BILL AKMG $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $878.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $26.25 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CARWARRANTYNOW.COM WARREN, BILL AKMG
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF RILEY, CATHY AS TO DEFENDANT AKMG
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARWARRANTYNOW.COM WARREN, BILL AKMG
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 11/04/11 TO BILL WARREN, "NO LONGER AT THIS ADDRESS".
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 11/04/11 TO CARWARRANTYNOW.COM, "NO LONGER AT THIS ADDRESS".
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AKMG
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
